summary: Tested PeopleHub Meetings & Recordings Hub end-to-end. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed (listing, source filters, sync, chat history/delete, chat POST error handling). Frontend: all 4 tabs, drawer, AI Chat, and Timeline calendar (Month/Week/Day) work correctly with proper data-testids. AI Chat is actually FUNCTIONAL (Emergent LLM key returned a real GPT-5.2 response — budget is NOT currently exceeded). Stats 208/200/8/8 match spec.

minor.issue: Returns 404 for single-meeting fetch by id (no detail endpoint). Frontend doesn't seem to need it directly but it is missing.

Returns 404 'Transcript not available' for fireflies meetings. Fireflies free-tier GraphQL doesn't return transcript_text — expected limitation, but the drawer's Transcript tab will appear empty. Should fallback to an inline empty-state message in UI.
Fireflies pull was non-deterministic (got 8 first run, 7 on a re-sync). Likely Fireflies free-tier rate limit / pagination flake. Spec expects 8 total. The 8 are present in DB from initial sync.

ui_bugs.issue: Console error spam: 'Error fetching trends: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading trends)' - appears on every dashboard mount. Out of scope for this task but worth flagging.
Recharts width(-1) height(-1) warning when chart container has 0 size. Cosmetic.
When transcript endpoint 404s for free-tier Fireflies meetings, console logs 'Error fetching transcript: AxiosError'. UI should show a graceful empty-state and suppress the console error.

issues: Stat cards correctly show 208/200/8/8 on All tab. Note: when switching to Fireflies tab, stat cards reflect only the 8 fireflies, which can confuse users (they appear to be 'global' stats but recompute per tab). Consider keeping global counts persistent.

action_items: Make /api/meetings/{id}/transcript return 200 with empty transcript_text & a friendly message instead of 404 for free-tier Fireflies (or have frontend suppress 404 and show empty state).
Add /api/meetings/{id} single-meeting GET endpoint for completeness.
Fix Dashboard 'trends' null-deref error (separate from Meetings work but visible in console).
Optional: keep Meetings Hub stats cards as global totals regardless of active tab.
critical_code_review_comments: AI Chat works end-to-end (POST /api/meetings/{id}/chat returns GPT-5.2 response). LLM budget is currently NOT exceeded contrary to the request hint — successful response observed in drawer.
Fireflies sync correctly persists 8 transcripts with recordings deep-link (https://app.fireflies.ai/view/<id>). 8/8 successful.
Meetings sort order is correctly descending by start_time (MAY 2026 → APRIL 2026 → ... → ~JAN 2026).

All required data-testids present: tab-all/attio/fireflies/timeline, meeting-drawer, drawer-tab-summary/transcript/actions/ai-chat, ai-chat-input/send-btn/messages, recording-open-0, timeline-view-month/week/day, timeline-prev/today/next-btn, timeline-day-YYYY-MM-DD chips.
Cards show date, time, title, source badge (Attio blue / Fireflies green), participant avatars, summary preview, recording / transcript / keywords badges — matches spec.
Dashboard 'trends' API integration has a null-handling bug (unrelated to Meetings Hub but visible).

success_rate.frontend: 95% (only minor: transcript 404 toast, dashboard trends error)

seed_data_creation: None. Used the existing 208 (200 Attio + 8 Fireflies) dataset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_meetings_hub.py — run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_meetings_hub.py -v. Fireflies sync count can fluctuate (free-tier API flakes). Sample meeting ids: fireflies_01KQFGRQ8A82V3K7W0N9JQE2XC. AI Chat is currently functional (NOT budget-exceeded as previously hinted).
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs. Two minor items: (a) transcript endpoint 404 surfaces a console AxiosError instead of empty-state UI; (b) Dashboard 'trends' null-deref is pre-existing and unrelated to Meetings Hub.
